# Delx Agent Utilities

Stateless utility tools for AI agents — 40 deterministic, session-free utilities for everyday agent operations.

Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/delx-agent-utilities
PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/delx-agent-utilities/
Install: pipx install "delx-agent-utilities[mcp]"

CLI: delx-agent-utilities (or delx-utils)
MCP server: delx-utils-mcp

Agent-readiness surfaces (call these first):
- delx_utilities_manifest
- delx_utilities_connection_status
- delx_utilities_privacy_audit

Tools are grouped:
- Encoding & parsing (12): util_json_validate, util_token_estimate, util_uuid_generate, util_timestamp_convert, util_base64, util_hash, util_regex_test, util_cron_describe, util_http_codes, util_jwt_inspect, util_csv_to_json, util_json_to_csv
- Web extract (6): util_page_extract, util_open_graph, util_links_extract, util_forms_extract, util_contact_extract, util_feed_discover
- Network probes (8): util_url_health, util_robots_inspect, util_sitemap_probe, util_tls_inspect, util_security_txt_inspect, util_http_headers_inspect, util_dns_lookup, util_rdap_lookup
- x402 / API intel (5): util_x402_server_probe, util_x402_resource_summary, util_x402_server_audit, util_api_health_report, util_openapi_summary
- Identity / contact (1): util_email_validate
- Composite reports (8): util_website_intelligence_report, util_domain_trust_report, util_docs_site_map, util_pricing_page_extract, util_company_contact_pack, util_api_integration_readiness, util_login_surface_report, util_content_distribution_report

Safety:
- No API keys required; networked tools call only public endpoints (rdap.org, dns.google) plus user-supplied URLs.
- Stateless: no session, no cache, no DB.
- Deterministic: no LLM calls.
- Not for high-throughput scraping or authoritative DNS / WHOIS verification.
